name: Human-Approval Workflow
description: Human-in-the-loop approval pattern where an agent drafts actions (emails, database changes, API calls) but pauses for human approval before execution. Demonstrates safe agent autonomy with explicit human oversight gates.

resources.name: AgentCore Runtime
resources.description: Managed container runtime for the approval workflow agent

resources.name: AgentCore Endpoint
resources.description: Public endpoint for invoking the agent

resources.name: IAM Role + 5 Policies
resources.description: Bedrock invoke, ECR pull, CloudWatch logs, CloudWatch metrics, X-Ray tracing

pattern_description: Human-in-the-loop approval pattern. The agent drafts actions but pauses for human review before execution. Approved actions proceed; rejected actions return feedback. Use this for high-stakes operations where human oversight is required.

parameters.name: container_image_uri
parameters.description: ECR image URI for the agent container
